title: Simple Smith
description: Upgrade your gear with a "Forging Skill" system
body:
# Simple Smith Mod

A Minecraft NeoForge mod that introduces a "Forging Skill" system, allowing players to craft equipment with powerful quality modifiers and deep Apotheosis integration.

## Compatibility Mod
**“Apotheosis”** 

## Overview
Simple Smith Mod allows players to develop their own "Forging Skill." By investing experience levels, you can improve your ability to craft superior equipment. Every piece of armor or weaponry you craft will receive a random "Quality" based on your current skill level, granting significant stat boosts.

## Key Features
* **Forging Skill Progression:** Open the dedicated GUI (Default: `O` key) to upgrade your Forging Skill by consuming XP levels.
* **Dynamic Quality System:** When crafting weapons, tools, or armor, a "Quality" tag is automatically applied. Higher skill levels increase the chance of obtaining rare, high-tier qualities.
* **Stat Amplification:** Applied qualities act as a multiplier for the item's base stats, making your crafted gear far more powerful than standard items.
* **Advanced Apotheosis Integration:**
    * High-tier qualities (e.g., "Legendary" or "Excellent") grant bonus sockets to crafted gear (up to +2).
    * **Gem Potency Boost:** The effects of any Gems socketed into the item are further amplified by the item's Quality multiplier.

## Commands
* `/smithskill set <level>`
    * Sets the player's forging level to a specific value. (Requires OP level 2)

## About the Author & Development
* **Idea:** r4g1san
* **AI Assistance:**
    * The code for this mod was developed with the assistance of **Google Gemini**.
    * The mod's icon was generated using **Grok**.
* **Development Note:** Please be aware that I am not a native English speaker. **Google Gemini was also utilized to translate the code comments, UI text, and this documentation.** I appreciate your understanding regarding any potential grammatical errors.
